name: mt-gateway-automation
description: Appium + WebdriverIO (TypeScript) mobile test automation for MyTravaly Gateway Android app

scripts.test:wallet: ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk npx wdio run config/wdio.conf.ts --spec test/specs/wallet.addfunds.spec.ts
scripts.test:engagement: ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk npx wdio run config/wdio.conf.ts --spec test/specs/engagement.preferences.spec.ts
scripts.test:content: ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk npx wdio run config/wdio.conf.ts --spec test/specs/content.other.spec.ts
scripts.test:nazitora: ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk npx wdio run config/wdio.conf.ts --spec test/specs/engagement.preferences.spec.ts --spec test/specs/content.other.spec.ts
scripts.test:onboarding: ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk npx wdio run config/wdio.conf.ts --spec test/specs/onboarding.*.spec.ts

author: Anshuman Rajkonwar & Nazitora Das
